meaning: n.快艇(或游艇)的女主人,驾驶快艇(或游艇)的女子,女帆船运动员
examples: Three boats were forced to abandon the race in the first few days, including British yachtswoman Emma Richards.
Its campaign has been backed by actress Dame Judi Dench, singer Joss Stone and yachtswoman Dame Ellen MacArthur.
The Scottish yachtswoman took 132 days to sail round the globe after setting off from New York on 15 September 2002.
